eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mississippi; at 7:40 PM on FEB 5, 2019 Effective until 8:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Mississippi Bureau of Investigation has issued an AMBER ALERT for 2 year old Genesis McCord of Pascagoula, Jackson County, Mississippi.  Genesis is described as a black female, 2 feet tall, unknown weight with brown eyes and black hair.  Genesis was last seen about 5:15 p.m. at Bandywood Apartments wearing unknown clothing. She was with her father, Joe Quincy McCord, and may now be with an unknown person, direction of travel unknown.  If anyone has information regarding the whereabouts of Genesis McCord contact the Mississippi Bureau of Investigation at 8 5 5 6 4 2 5 3 7 8.
